mutation CreateFile($input: CreateFileInput!) {

      deletedBy
      description
      id
      name

      size

}

exec: // CRITICAL: Token MUST match current environment issuer
// If Silo is empty or stale, try a silent heal
// Check if Bruno's internal store has a match for this env (happens right after login)
// Clear silo to prevent stale loops
throw new Error(`[Auth] 🛑 No session for [${env}]. Please run 'Zitadel Login' once.`);
